data.body:
Goal:
Expose stale grooming queue and worker health in the Diagnostics runtime page using the scope refinement diagnostics pattern.

Verification:
1. Diagnostics page shows stale grooming worker status, queue size, active jobs, recent failures, and recent completed review results.
2. Status route tests cover queue/worker/review status.

Constraints:
Keep default tests hermetic and avoid host process or fs access in unit tests.
data.title: Add stale grooming diagnostics
